task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: RenameRequest struct with correct json tags ('source', 'destination') present in api/types.go; Client.Rename method added to api/client.go correctly POSTing to /api/rename; RenameHandler implemented in server/routes.go with CopyModel() followed by srcManifest.Remove() and RemoveLayers(), returns 404 (StatusNotFound) when source missing and 409 (StatusConflict) when destination exists; route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) properly wired in GenerateRoutes; CLI command 'rename SOURCE DEST' defined with cobra.ExactArgs(2); RenameHandler function in cmd/cmd.go correctly calls client.Rename(); command added to both required command lists in NewCLI(); no existing test files modified, all existing code remains intact. Implementation is complete and correct.
